{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Alliance camp
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Alliance camp]] is a location where various factions reside.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
